title: oxalis corniculata var. pilosa
intro: Oxalis corniculata var. pilosa is a perennial weed plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family, commonly known as a creeping wood sorrel or yellow wood sorrel. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Oxalis corniculata var. pilosa include its ability to help manage urinary tract issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
